name: The Architect's Dispatch
description: Strategic intelligence system for navigating transitions between paradigms

goals.title: Launch Substack Publication
goals.description: Deploy The Architect's Dispatch with paid tier ($150/month)

goals.title: Build Intelligence Architecture
goals.description: 8-agent autonomous system with Alfred, Machiavelli, Pattern Detector, Synthesis Engine, Autonomous Controller, Self-Improvement Engine, Archivist, Orchestrator

agents.name: Alfred
agents.title: Chief of Staff / Daily Briefing
agents.description: Daily intelligence briefings on 7 domains: biotech, geopolitics, AI, resources, monetary, energy, realignment

agents.name: Machiavelli Geostrategist
agents.title: Senior Strategic Analyst
agents.description: Deep geopolitical analysis using Six Pillars framework: Resource Determinism, Peripheral Strangulation, Asymmetric Pressure, Cascade Dynamics, Fortress Logic, Two-Level Game

agents.name: Pattern Detector
agents.title: Intelligence Analyst - Trends
agents.description: Identifies trends, anomalies, and emerging signals across intelligence archives. Runs every 6 hours.

agents.name: Synthesis Engine
agents.title: Integration Processor
agents.description: Combines outputs from multiple agents into unified intelligence products: cross-domain synthesis, temporal synthesis, agent fusion, scenario building

agents.name: Autonomous Controller
agents.title: Self-Directing System
agents.description: Operates without user triggers, anticipates needs, self-corrects. Runs every 2 hours to predict and queue proactive briefings.

agents.name: Self-Improvement Engine
agents.title: Meta-Learning System
agents.description: Refines agent prompts, optimizes workflows, eliminates inefficiencies. Daily at 3 AM.

agents.name: Archivist
agents.title: Knowledge Keeper
agents.description: Store, retrieve, and synthesize intelligence history. Daily archival sweep at 9 PM.

agents.name: Intelligence Orchestrator
agents.title: System Coordinator
agents.description: Routes intelligence tasks to appropriate sub-agents. Central command layer.
